title: BLD-429: Bundle hlx-cli agent skill
description: Walkthrough of the new `hlx skill` command — bundled skill content, path resolution, show/install handlers, command router, CLI entry point wiring, CI validation, and tests.

steps.title: Bundled skill content
steps.description: The canonical SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter. This file ships inside the npm tarball as a static asset. It contains operational guidance for AI agents: guardrails, environment setup, available commands, common workflows, and flag conventions.

steps.title: Reference: detailed command docs
steps.description: A per-command reference file covering all hlx CLI commands with flags, usage patterns, and tips. Bundled alongside SKILL.md in the tarball.

steps.title: Tarball bundling — files[] updated
steps.description: Added 'skill-content' to the files[] array so npm includes the skill-content/ directory in the published tarball. No build script changes needed.

steps.title: Path resolution utility
steps.description: getSkillContentDir() resolves the bundled skill-content/ directory at runtime using import.meta.url (same pattern as src/update/version.ts). If the directory is missing (corrupt install), exits non-zero with a reinstall instruction.

steps.title: Show handler — clean stdout output
steps.description: cmdShow() reads SKILL.md with readFileSync and writes to process.stdout.write. No banners, no log noise, no console.log — pipe-friendly output.

steps.title: Install handler — core logic
steps.description: cmdInstall() implements three-tier target resolution (--target > --for > auto-detect), no-overwrite safety, --force mode, and atomic install with rollback. Uses only node:fs, node:path, node:os built-ins.

steps.title: Target resolution — auto-detection
steps.description: resolveDestination() checks ~/.claude/skills/ and ~/.codex/skills/ existence. If exactly one exists, uses it. Both -> error with --for hint. Neither -> error with --target hint.

steps.title: Skill command router
steps.description: runSkill() follows the inspect/index.ts pattern: calls getSkillContentDir() first (corrupt-install gate), then dispatches to show or install based on subcommand. No auth required.

steps.title: CLI entry point — skill case added
steps.description: The 'skill' case in the main switch dispatches to runSkill(args.slice(1)). Also added to SKIP_AUTO_UPDATE set (line 64) and usage text (lines 53-54).

steps.title: CI tarball validation
steps.description: New grep check ensures skill-content/SKILL.md is present in the tarball before publishing. Prevents accidental publish without bundled skill content.

steps.title: Unit tests — 20 test cases
steps.description: Tests cover: path resolution, SKILL.md content output, --target install, byte-for-byte match, no-overwrite safety, --force overwrite, auto-detection failure, --for validation, and atomic rollback on copy failure.
